creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

2.6.0 was comitted to x11-wm/fvwm2 yesterday (April 16, 2011). 2.6.0 was in 
fvwm2-devel while a repocopy of 2.4.20 was being performed to x11-wm/fvwm24. 
Once the repocopy was complete 2.6.0 (and subsequently 2.6.1) was committed 
to x11-wm/fvwm2 and 2.7.0 was committed to x11-wm/fvwm2-devel.
